note: Day 36 (Sunday). Re-confirmation run. Notes for leads 1/3/22 are ACTIVE and unchanged from Day 35 — no new HANDS activity, no profile data received, no post_reference upgrades possible without HANDS checking profiles. Preferred dispatch: TUESDAY 2026-05-06 (first working day after May Day bank holiday 2026-05-05). IMAP gap now 29 days. Post_reference upgrades remain possible and strongly preferred — HANDS must check each profile on Tuesday before deciding note type. Generic notes are ready if no recent posts found.

strategy.char_limit_note: 200 characters is an absolute hard limit on LinkedIn free accounts. Count every character including spaces, punctuation, and the name at the start. Test in a notepad before sending.
strategy.tone: slightly awkward genuine observation — the kind a real person makes when they noticed something but are not sure how to say it. Stands out from polished AI outreach slop by being specific and slightly imperfect.
anti_patterns: Do not use 'I came across your profile'
Do not use 'I was impressed by'
Do not use 'I noticed your impressive work'
Do not mention AI or automation
Do not pitch in the note — curiosity and connection only
Do not use 'reach out', 'touch base', or 'synergies'
Do not mention 'digital marketing', 'web design', 'SEO', or 'website' explicitly in warm pipeline notes
Do not reference the email outreach — treat as a cold connection from someone who noticed their business
Do not reference the call that Claire booked (lead 3) — treat as first contact
Do not use generic 'I love what you do' phrases
Do not start with 'I' — start with the person's name or business
what_works: Start with their name — feels personal, cuts through
Name the specific business — shows you looked, not just searched
One specific observation — not vague, not flattering, just real
End with low-pressure framing ('in case it's useful', 'connecting in case relevant')
Slightly awkward construction is fine — it reads human
strategy.priority_upgrade_rule: HANDS: always check LinkedIn profile for posts from the last 60 days BEFORE sending any note. If a post is found: write a bespoke post_reference note (3-4x higher acceptance rate than generic). If no recent posts: use the generic note below. This step is MANDATORY for warm pipeline leads.
strategy.warm_pipeline_note_rule: Notes for leads 1/3/22 must NOT reference the email sequence, the campaign, the website audit, the call, or any prior contact. Treat as a cold LinkedIn connection from someone who noticed their business through general research.
strategy.presumed_lost_framing: These leads are PRESUMED_LOST_NO_RESPONSE. The note is a soft, no-pressure connection — not a follow-up. If they connect and message, respond naturally. Do NOT immediately pitch. Build rapport first.
strategy.post_reference_priority: Claire (lead 3) > Rob (lead 22) > Tom (lead 1) — by LinkedIn sector activity likelihood.

post_reference_upgrade.instruction: STRONGLY PREFERRED. If Claire has posted about salon news, team achievements, spring/summer colour trends, bank holiday availability, wedding hair bookings, prom season, or Leeds business content in the last 60 days: write a bespoke note referencing the specific post. Salons post frequently — this upgrade is highly likely.

campaign_linkedin_assessment.root_cause: HANDS execution latency — LinkedIn window (Day 3-6) missed for every batch across all 36 campaign days. Notes were generated correctly by BRAIN on 9 runs. Zero notes confirmed sent by HANDS.
campaign_linkedin_assessment.key_learning: The post_reference upgrade step requires HANDS to check each profile before sending — this was not executed once across 36 days. For warm pipeline (leads 1/3/22): HANDS must open LinkedIn, search, check posts, and send in a SINGLE SESSION on Tuesday 2026-05-06.
campaign_linkedin_assessment.tuesday_protocol: BRAIN flags TUESDAY 2026-05-06 as the mandatory warm pipeline LinkedIn session. HANDS must write linkedin_profiles.json after every search session — even if no note was sent. This has not happened once in 36 days.
campaign_linkedin_assessment.escalation_note: If HANDS does not execute on Tuesday 2026-05-06: warm pipeline LinkedIn opportunity expires. Wednesday 2026-05-07 is the absolute last acceptable day. After that: archive leads 1/3/22 and treat as permanently closed.
